cases.prompt: 고령 사용자도 쓸 수 있는 시니어 앱 UX 설계해줘. 큰 글씨랑 저시력 지원 포함해서.

assertions.text: Supports OS dynamic-type / font-scaling (iOS Dynamic Type, Android sp, web rem+zoom)
Specifies large-target, high-contrast senior layouts (>=48px, no time pressure)
Produces an inclusive-UX checklist plus concrete component patterns

cases.prompt: Audit this UI for elderly and low-literacy users.

assertions.text: Reduces reading level to grade 6 or below in plain language
Uses progressive disclosure for low cognitive load and error-tolerant flows
Focuses on age and literacy rather than WCAG checkbox compliance (which accessibility-audit covers)
